calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an adult and Change of Name of Minors: Jane Louise Salisbury and Angus Ferenc Salisbury.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Petitioner: Louise Foti present in pro per and for the minors, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Louise Maria Stephens
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Jane Louise Stephens and Angus Ferenc Stephens.
Decree signed in open court.
